subcodes.first_line: In the Land of Mystery this most exalted Word hath been revealed from the Most Sublime Pen: Erelong shall clamorous cries resound in most lands [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در ارض زوراء از قلم اعلی این کلمهٴ علیا جاری و نازل سوف یرتفع النعاق فی اکثر الدیار
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @exhortations and counsels, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @predictions and prophecies, @firmness in the Covenant
